# dependencytrack_license_group (Data Source)

Fetch a license group by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "dependencytrack_license_group" "example" {
  name = "Permissive"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the license group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the license group.
- `licenses` (Attributes List) List of licenses in license group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--licenses))
- `risk_weight` (Number) Risk Weight of the license group.

<a id="nestedatt--licenses"></a>
### Nested Schema for `licenses`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Full name of the license.
- `spdx_id` (String) SPDX ID of the license, as per https://spdx.org/licenses
- `uuid` (String) UUID for the license.
